name: netunnel-jwthenticator

metadata.name: netunnel-jwthenticator
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License

modules.name: netunnel_jwthenticator.plugin
documentation:
This plugin add support for JWThenticator on NETunnel.
IMPORTANT
We do not verify the tokens generated by the JWThenticator server, the setup must include
some type of reverse proxy which validates the tokens directly with JWThenticator.

functions.name: netunnel_jwthenticator.plugin.get_verify_ssl
documentation:
NETunnel expects an SSLContext object and None considered "True" while JWThenticator expects a boolean.
We "degrade" the SSLContext to boolean value to support JWThenticator's expected value

methods.name: netunnel_jwthenticator.plugin.JWThenticatorAuthServer.is_authenticated
documentation: As mentioned above, the request's headers should be verified by an external webserver.

methods.name: netunnel_jwthenticator.plugin.JWThenticatorAuthServer.authenticate
documentation: This will never be called. The JWThenticator on the server-side will validate the request
